justification: The issue describes a scenario where `df.query()` behaves inconsistently based on the type of columns involved and throws an error in one case. This suggests a bug in the implementation.
current_state_summary: The issue is closed, but the behavior described by the user remains unresolved. Related open issues exist that may indicate ongoing work on similar bugs.

related_issues.title: Working with arrays inside cells - mean() works, median() crashes
BUG: Series mode crashes when there is more than one mode
BUG: inconsistent behavior and crash in `DataFrame.__setitem__` when >=3d ndarray is used
